name: 簡良翰
objective:
課程大綱：
本課程之目的為訓練學生有關電子設備散熱設計之相關原理與技術。介紹各項電子元件之發熱量、溫度與元件穩定性之關係，熱對流、熱輻射等熱傳原理在電子設備散熱之的應用法則；解說電子設備散熱器之演進與設計原理，如：熱管之原理與演進、小型風散之特性與設計原則等。探討電子設備的熱阻抗分析、溫度計算、熱應力分析，並介紹相關電腦輔助分析軟體。
This course introduces principles and techniques of thermal management and cooling design of electronic equipments. Subjects of this course include: thermal and physical properties of electronic components, thermo-fluid phenomena and principles of thermal management for electronic devices, and the evolution of cooling devices such as heat pipes and micro fans, discussion of analysis methodologies and computer software of thermal management problems including thermal resistances, temperature gradient, and thermal stress.
schedule:
週次 授 課 內 容 要 項
1	電子設備散熱問題介紹 Introduction of the problems in cooling of electronics
2	熱傳導原理簡介與散熱鰭片之熱傳計算 Fundamentals of conduction theory and calculation of fin efficiency
3	電子設備之熱阻與熱傳分析 Thermal resistance and heat transfer analysis of electronic cooling
4	電子散熱設備製造實務導覽 (校外教學) Field trip for the manufacturing of electronic cooling devices
5	流體力學基礎 Fundamentals of fluid mechanics
6	電子設備散熱系統壓降計算 Pressure drop calculation for the cooling system of electronic devices
7	熱對流原理 Principles of convection heat transfer
8	與氣冷式冷卻器 and air-cooled heat sinks
9	期中考 Midterm exam
10	液體冷卻與微渠道熱傳 Liquid cooling and micro-channel heat transfer
11	電子設備之散熱模組設計 Design of cooling modules for electronic devices
12	浸泡式電腦散熱系統 Immersion cooling of the computer system
13	蒸發與冷凝在電子設備散熱器之應用 Evaporation and condensation in cooling of electronics
14	熱管原理與電子設備散熱之應用 Heat pipe theory and its application in cooling of electronics
15	電子設備之熱輻射問題解析 Thermal radiation analysis in the cooling of electronics
16	Holiday (12/25)
17	Holiday (1/1)
18	期末報告與期末考 Final Report and Exam
scorePolicy: 作業 (Home work) 30% + 期中考 (Midterm exam) 30%+ 期末報告 (Term Report) 15%+ 期末考 (Final exam) 25%
materials:
1.	Remsburg, R., Advanced Thermal Design of Electronic Equipment, International Thomson Publishing, Newyork, 1997.
2.	Yeh, L.T. and Chu, R.C., "Thermal management of microelectronic equipment: heat transfer theory, analysis methods, and design practices," ASME Press, New York, 2003.
3.	Sergent, J. and Krum, A., Thermal Management Handbook, McGraw-Hill, New York, 1998.
4.	Mills, A. F., Heat Transfer 2nd Ed., Prentice Hall, 1999.Myers, G. E., Analytical Methods in Conduction Heat Transfer, Genium Publishing, 1987.
5.	Steinberg, D. S., Cooling Techniques for Electronic Equipment, John Willey & Sons, Inc., New York, 1991.
6.	Oosthuizen, P. H., Naylor, D., Convective Heat Transfer Analysis, , McGraw Hill, 1999.
consultation: 1. 課程諮詢時間 Office hour: Monday 10:00am~12:00pm, Tuesday 1:00~5:00pm2. 開學後組成線上群組 Line group discussion: to be announced.
課程對應SDGs指標: SDG7：可負擔的潔淨能源（Affordable and Clean Energy）SDG9：產業創新與基礎設施（Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure）
課程是否導入AI: ● 使用生成式 AI 作為教學過程的輔助工具（Use generative AI tools as an aid to the teaching process）● 鼓勵學生使用生成式 AI 工具（Encourage students to use generative AI tools）
remarks: 依據本校採遠距教學時機，採用 Microsoft Teams 進行線上教學，並提供上課錄影檔案連結功課後觀看。
